name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench, grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower it to mid-chest, then press straight up until arms are extended.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: On a 30-degree incline bench, press two dumbbells from chest level up and slightly together, then lower under control.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Start in a plank with hands under shoulders. Lower your chest to just above the floor, keeping a straight line, then push back up.

name: Bent-Over Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at the hips with a flat back, pull the bar to your lower ribs, squeeze the shoulder blades, then lower under control.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Grip the bar wider than shoulders, pull it down to your upper chest while keeping your torso upright, then return slowly.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from a bar with an overhand grip, pull your chin above the bar by driving your elbows down, then lower fully.

name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand tall holding dumbbells at your sides, curl them toward your shoulders keeping elbows pinned, then lower slowly.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells with a neutral (palms-in) grip and curl up, keeping wrists straight, then lower under control.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Grip a bar with palms facing you, pull your chin over the bar focusing on the biceps, then lower fully.

name: Triceps Pushdown
instructions: With a high cable, keep elbows at your sides and extend the rope down until arms are straight, then return slowly.

name: Overhead Triceps Extension
instructions: Hold one dumbbell overhead, lower it behind your head by bending the elbows, then extend back up.

name: Dips
instructions: Support yourself on parallel bars, lower until elbows reach 90 degrees, then press back up keeping torso upright.

name: Overhead Barbell Press
instructions: From shoulder height, press the bar overhead until arms lock out, keeping your core tight, then lower to the collarbone.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
instructions: Raise dumbbells out to your sides up to shoulder height with a slight elbow bend, then lower slowly.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Rest forearms on your thighs, palms up, and curl the dumbbells using only your wrists, then lower.

name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: With the bar on your upper back, sit down and back until thighs are parallel, then drive up through your heels.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold a dumbbell at your chest, squat down keeping your chest up and knees tracking over toes, then stand.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward into a lunge until both knees are at 90 degrees, then push off the front foot into the next step.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: With a slight knee bend, hinge at the hips and lower the bar along your legs, then drive your hips forward to stand.

name: Lying Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down and curl the pad toward your glutes by flexing the hamstrings, then lower slowly.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: With upper back on a bench and a bar over your hips, drive your hips up until your body is level, then lower.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent, squeeze your glutes to lift your hips, hold briefly, then lower.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand tall and rise onto the balls of your feet as high as possible, pause, then lower under control.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold a forearm plank with a straight line from head to heels, bracing your core and glutes the whole time.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from a bar and raise your legs until they are parallel to the floor (or higher), then lower slowly.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back and alternate bringing each elbow toward the opposite knee while extending the other leg.

name: Running
instructions: Maintain an upright posture and a steady, comfortable pace. Land midfoot and keep a relaxed arm swing.

name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Jump while spreading your legs and raising your arms overhead, then jump back to the start in a steady rhythm.

name: Burpee
instructions: From standing, drop into a squat, kick back to a plank, do a push-up, jump your feet in, then jump up explosively.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Dip into a quarter squat and jump onto a sturdy box, landing softly with bent knees, then step back down.

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: In a plank, rapidly drive your knees toward your chest one at a time, keeping your hips low and core tight.

name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Place one heel forward with the leg straight, hinge at the hips with a flat back until you feel a gentle stretch, hold 20-30s.

name: Chest Doorway Stretch
instructions: Place your forearm on a doorframe at 90 degrees and gently lean forward until you feel a stretch across the chest, hold 20-30s.

name: Child's Pose
instructions: Kneel and sit back onto your heels, reaching your arms forward and lowering your chest toward the floor, hold and breathe.
